title: NLP Workflow for Sentiment Analysis
description: A step-by-step flowchart illustrating the end-to-end process of performing sentiment analysis on a text input, showcasing key NLP tasks.
elements: Trained ML Model (e.g., Naive Bayes, SVM)
relationships: Input Text is processed by Tokenization
Tokenization output is cleaned via Stopword Removal & Stemming
Cleaned tokens are converted into numerical features via Feature Extraction
Extracted features are fed into the Trained ML Model for classification
Model produces the final Sentiment Output
